game_info.title: Mugman's Brawl
game_info.concept:
Cuphead is a classic run and gun action game heavily focused on boss battles. Inspired by cartoons of the 1930s, the visuals and audio are painstakingly created with the same techniques of the era, i.e. traditional hand drawn cel animation, watercolor backgrounds, and original jazz recordings.
Cuphead is a classic run and gun action game heavily focused on boss battles. Inspired by cartoons of the 1930s, the visuals and audio are painstakingly created with the same techniques of the era, i.e. traditional hand drawn cel animation, watercolor backgrounds, and original jazz recordings.

Play as Cuphead or Mugman (in single player or local co-op) as you traverse strange worlds, acquire new weapons, learn powerful super moves, and discover hidden secrets while you try to pay your debt back to the devil!
game_info.description: Welcome to "Cuphead: The Raging Radish"! In this 1930s cartoon-inspired boss battle, you play as Cuphead. Your objective is to defeat the giant, angry Radish causing havoc in the garden. Dodge his dirt clods, jump over shockwaves, and avoid the roots springing from the ground. Keep moving and shooting to whittle down his health before yours runs out!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move Left / Right
- Down Arrow: Duck (reduces hitbox)
- Space: Jump
- Z: Shoot (Hold for rapid fire)
- Shift: Dash (Quick movement burst)
- Enter: Start Game
- Escape: Pause Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic Survival Test. The goal is to verify that the player character can move, jump, and stay alive for a short duration against the boss's attacks.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will make the player randomly move left and right and jump periodically. It will also hold the shoot button to ensure basic offensive capability is functional.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should survive for at least 5 seconds without crashing. Game state logs should reflect player movement and projectile firing.

TEST_2.test_description: Boss Defeat Test. The goal is to verify that the boss can be defeated by a skilled player (simulated AI).
TEST_2.strategy_description: The AI will track the boss's position to aim (align vertical height if possible, though basic shooting is horizontal). It will jump if projectiles are detected nearby and constantly fire while facing the boss.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The Boss's health should reach 0, triggering the "GAME_OVER_WIN" state. The test is successful if the Win screen is displayed.
